content:
Welcome to your GRC Content Copilot!

This is a placeholder post. The automated pipeline will generate fresh content at 5 AM and 6 PM IST daily.

Once activated, you'll find:
- Daily LinkedIn posts based on top GRC news
- Carousel content ready for Canva
- Weekly newsletters for your "Unwritten Rules of GRC" series

Stay tuned!

#GRC #Compliance #Privacy #RiskManagement
